---
title: "Past Seminars"
subtitle: "Archive of previous BioMIND seminar series talks"
description: "Past talks in the BioMIND seminar series."
---

This page archives BioMIND seminar series talks. As the series builds out, talks will be listed here with date, speaker, affiliation, title, and (where available) abstract and recording.

::: {.bm-callout .bm-callout-gold}
**Archive is being seeded.** Past talks from member labs (CASL, Human-CAIR, MoML, AIAIR) hosted under predecessor names can be added here. Please contact the cluster coordinator with date, speaker, and title.
:::

## Archive

| Date | Speaker | Affiliation | Title |
|------|---------|-------------|-------|
| YYYY-MM-DD | Speaker Name | Affiliation | Talk title (placeholder) |
| YYYY-MM-DD | Speaker Name | Affiliation | Talk title (placeholder) |
| YYYY-MM-DD | Speaker Name | Affiliation | Talk title (placeholder) |

## Add an entry

Past talks live in `seminars/past.qmd`. Append a row to the table above, or expand it into a richer block format with abstract and links to slides or recordings.
